title: The Three Must-Get-Theres
writer: Alexandre Dumas, Max Linder, Tom Miranda
actors: Max Linder, Bull Montana, Frank Cooke
plot: This delightful burlesque of Alexandre Dumas' famous adventure narrative (and then-leading screen swashbuckler Douglas Fairbanks' hit films) represented one of writer/director/star Max Linder's attempts to conquer Hollywood on its...
